meaning: n.增湿器,湿润器,湿度调节器
examples: This can be in lieu of having to buy a humidifier and leaving it running.
Another was using a humidifier for a child who was allergic to dust mites;
If you get within a certain number of miles from home, your oven might start heating up, or your humidifier would switch on.
There would also be an inflatable ring around the baby, allowing it to feel more secure and to mimic the conditions in the womb, and a humidifier would pump warm air around inside.
